overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through Night City. The player character walks along sidewalks and crosses streets beneath elevated highways and neon-lit skyscrapers, encountering moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, approaching an intersection

entered.detail: large curved concrete overpass structure with yellow accent lighting underneath
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
yellow metal safety railing separating sidewalk from street
tall building with illuminated red and white signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime urban sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway. Palm trees and yellow railings line the path while neon-lit buildings glow in the distance. The player walks forward toward an intersection, with sparse pedestrian activity and occasional vehicles passing on the right.

events.description: futuristic sports cars drive past on the right while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street beneath the overpass, navigating between passing vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with glowing red taillights driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt
sleek black vehicle with illuminated accents and red taillights

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the street beneath the massive overpass structure. Futuristic vehicles pass by on the right while other pedestrians cross in different directions. The environment remains sheltered under the highway with concrete support pillars visible, and the crosswalk markings guide the path across the asphalt.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing concrete pillars and overhead lights

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead highway
long linear white lights mounted on the overpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway in a more enclosed corridor. Massive concrete pillars line the left side while overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the path. The space feels narrower and more urban, with building facades visible on the right and the constant presence of the overpass overhead.

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into an open intersection with tall skyscrapers visible
pedestrians cross the wide intersection as vehicles wait at the traffic lights

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with a group of pedestrians, surrounded by towering buildings and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: woman in red top standing in the crosswalk looking at her phone

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
massive illuminated advertisement screen showing a woman's face
wide yellow crosswalk markings spanning the multi-lane street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from beneath the overpass into a vast open intersection surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with advertisements. The player crosses the wide street with other pedestrians while futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection, creating a bustling downtown atmosphere.

events.description: enters covered commercial walkway beneath building overhang with prominent neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk, passing by illuminated storefronts and other pedestrians

entered.detail: modern building with large glass windows and illuminated interior levels
bright green and yellow neon sign advertising businesses
extended roof structure covering the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath building overhangs. Bright neon signs illuminate the storefronts on the right while the street runs alongside. The environment feels more enclosed again, with the architecture creating an urban canyon effect lined with commercial establishments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a nighttime urban corridor that shifts from an open sidewalk into a sheltered concrete underpass. It begins on a sidewalk lined with palm trees and yellow railings, moving forward toward a city intersection beneath the looming shadow of a massive elevated highway. As the camera crosses the street, the open air gives way to the heavy presence of the overpass, with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians passing through the crosswalk. The scene then narrows into a more enclosed corridor, where the view is framed by massive concrete support pillars on the left and glowing building facades on the right. Finally, the path is illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights as the camera continues its progression deep beneath the urban infrastructure.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vast, open urban intersection into a more enclosed commercial corridor. It begins by emerging from beneath an overpass into a wide downtown plaza, where towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards cast a bright glow over the bustling street. As the camera crosses the intersection amidst a flow of pedestrians and futuristic vehicles, the expansive scale of the city dominates the view. The scene then shifts as the camera moves away from the open road and onto a covered sidewalk, where building overhangs begin to constrain the space. Finally, the environment narrows into an urban canyon effect, lined with glowing neon storefronts and commercial establishments that create a dense, sheltered atmosphere.
